chapter_title.ar: بَابُ تَقْدِيمِ طَوَافِ الْحَجِّ لِلْمُتَمَتِّعِ قَبْلَ الْخُرُوجِ إِلَى مِنًى
chapter_title.en: Chapter 159 – Bringing forward the circumambulation of the Hajj for the performer of Tumatto before the going out to Mina

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/113)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/113)
text: لَا بَأْسَ بِتَعْجِيلِ الطَّوَافِ لِلشَّيْخِ الْكَبِيرِ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ تَخَافُ الْحَيْضَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَخْرُجَ إِلَى مِنًى .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from hafs Bin Al Bakhtary, and Muawiya Bin Ammar, and Hammad, from Al Halby, altogether,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘There is no problem with hastening the Tawaaf, for the aged old man, and the woman who fears the menstruation, before the going out to Mina’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Um ay r from Hafs ibn al-Bakhtariy Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar and Hammad from al-Halabiy all have said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Old people, and women who are afraid of experiencing Hayd (menses), can perform Tawaf before leaving for Mina’.’”
